lines.name: Description
lines.value: Friendly **^^Astra Militarum Infantry**^^ models can be set up or end any type of move on top of the platform section of this **^^Fortification^^**.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this **^^Fortification^^**, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While an **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** model has the Benefit of Cover as a result of this terrain feature, that model has a 4+ invulnerable save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: When this model is set up, it will consist of 1 platform section, up to 5 shield sections, up to 2 broken shield sections and up to 2 end sections. All sections must be connected to each other to form a continuous defence line; the 2 broken shield sections can be placed either at the end of the defence line, or in the middle of it such that both are within ½" of each other (in this case, these 2 sections count as being connected to each other). All of the sections that have been set up are then treated as a single model for all rules purposes.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to an **^^Astra Militarum^^** model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this **^^Baneblade^^** model, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s tremor cannon, the target unit and every other enemy **^^Infantry^^** unit within 3" of that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 26 **^^Astra Militarum Infantry models^^**. Each **^^Ogryn^^** model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport **^^Artillery^^** models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack made with this model’s quake cannon destroys an enemy model that has the Deadly Demise ability, that model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 3+ instead of on a 6.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its earthshaker cannon scored a hit against an enemy **^^Infantry^^** unit, until the start of your next Shooting phase, that unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack is allocated to a model in this unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

lines.name: Orders
lines.value: This **^^Officer^^** can issue 2 Orders to **^^Regiment^^** units.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

lines.name: Orders
lines.value: This unit’s **^^Officer^^** can issue 1 Order to a **^^Regiment^^** unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit contains an **^^Officer^^**, each time a ranged attack targets this unit, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, models in this unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

entries.name: Cadian Veteran Guardsman w/ Regimental standard
Grenade launcher and close combat weapon
Plasma gun and close combat weapon
Cadian Veteran Guardsman w/ Master vox

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

entries.name: 1 Shock Trooper Sergeant and 9 Shock Troopers
2 Shock Trooper Sergeants and 18 Shock Troopers

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if this unit made a Charge move or was charged this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll.

entries.name: 1 Jungle Fighter Sergeant and 9 Jungle Fighters
2 Jungle Fighter Sergeants and 18 Jungle Fighters

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Command phase, one **^^Officer^^** model embarked within this **^^Transport^^** can issue Orders even though it is not on the battlefield. When doing so, measure distances to and from this *^^Transport^^**.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** models. Each **^^Ogryn^^** model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport **^^Artillery^^** models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle round, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. If you do, one model in that unit is destroyed, and that unit is then no longer Battle-shocked.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While another **^^Officer^^** model is in the same unit as this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

lines.name: Orders
lines.value: This Officer can issue 1 Order to a Regiment unit. This Officer can only issue the Duty and Honour! and Fix Bayonets! Orders.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if this unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if this unit is Below Half-strength.

entries.name: 1 Death Korps Watchmaster and 9 Death Korps Troopers
Death Korps Trooper w/ Death Korps medi-pack
2 Death Korps Watchmaster and 18 Death Korps Troopers
Death Korps Trooper w/ Death Korps medi-pack

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
In your Shooting phase, each time this model is selected to shoot, if it has not shot with its  Deathstrike missile this battle, you can do one of the following in addition to resolving this model’s ranged attacks:

- **Designate Target:** If this model does not have a Deathstrike Target marker on the battlefield, place a Deathstrike Target marker for this model anywhere on the battlefield.

- **Adjust Target:** If this model has a Deathstrike Target marker on the battlefield, move that marker to anywhere else on the battlefield.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model’s magma cannon targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, that target is always considered to be within half range of that weapon.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 26 **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** models. Each **^^Ogryn^^** model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport **^^Artillery^^** models.

entries.name: Ordnance Team w/ Malleus rocket launcher
Ordnance Team w/ Bombast field gun

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Ibram Gaunt has a 5+ Invulnerable Save

entries.name: Tanith Ghost w/ Corbec's hot-shot lascarbine
Tanith Ghost w/ Mkoll's Straight Silver Knife

lines.name: Orders
lines.value: This unit’s **^^Officer^^** can issue up to 2 Orders to **^^Regiment^^** or **^^Gaunt’s Ghosts^^** units.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have the Benefit of Cover.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Ibram Gaunt has a 5+ Invulnerable Save

units.name: Tanith Ghost w/ Corbec's hot-shot lascarbine
Tanith Ghost w/ Mkoll's Straight Silver Knife

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+, or on unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ instead if this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly **^^Platoon^^** units.

entries.name: Heavy Weapons Team w/ Heavy bolter
Heavy Weapons Team w/ Missile launcher

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for making ranged attacks while enemy units are within Engagement Range of it.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that unit is scattered. While a unit is scattered, it cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that can **^^Fly^^**, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

profiles.name: Been There, Seen it, Killed it

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a melee attack, if it made a Charge move this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Orders
lines.value: This Officer can issue up to 2 Orders to Regiment units.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle round, at the start of any phase, you can select one Order to affect this unit until the start of your next Command phase, in addition to any other Orders issued to this unit by an **^^Officer^^** model this turn.

entries.name: Kasrkin Trooper w/ Hot-shot marksman rifle
Kasrkin Trooper w/ Hot-shot laspistol and melta mine

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one enemy unit within 3" of the bearer and roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds, or 2D3 mortal wounds instead if it is a **^^Vehicle^^** unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and, if that unit is within range of an objective marker you do not control, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: When making ranged attacks with its demolisher battle cannon, this model can target enemy units within Engagement Range of it (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, when making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack targets this model, if this model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack with its executioner plasma cannon that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its exterminator autocannon. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly **^^Astra Militarum^^** unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per phase.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its vanquisher battle cannon that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Orders
lines.value:
This **^^Officer^^** can issue up to 3 Orders to:
- **^^Regiment^^** units
- **^^Squadron^^** units
- **^^Titanic^^** units

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of your Command phase, If this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^Astra Militarum^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this model is in your army, it must be your **^^Warlord^^**.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding **^^Monsters^^** and **^^Vehicles^^**) that was hit by one or more of those attacks made with this model's storm eagle rockets. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit is staggered. While a unit is staggered, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit (to a minimum of 1).

lines.name: Orders
lines.value: This unit’s **^^Officer^^** can issue 1 Order to a **^^Regiment^^** unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can return up to D3 destroyed Tempestus Scions models to this unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While a friendly **^^Tech-Priest Enginseer^^** model is leading this unit, improve the Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill characteristics of ranged and melee weapons equipped by **^^Munitorum Servitor^^** models in this unit by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a **^^Regimental Enginseer^^** (a unit cannot have more than one **^^Munitorum Servitors^^** unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 6+ invulnerable save.

entries.name: Munitorum Servitor w/ Servitor's Servo Arm

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this model must join one **^^Command Squad^^** unit from your army (a **^^Command Squad^^** cannot have more than one **^^Loyal Protector^^** model joined to it). This model then counts as part of that **^^Command Squad^^** for the rest of the battle, and its Starting Strength is increased accordingly. If it is not possible to join this model to a **^^Command Squad^^**, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed. 

While this model is joined to a unit, it can embark within any **^^Transport^^** that unit can embark within, and takes up the space of 3 models.

This model cannot be selected as your **^^Warlord^^**.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this model must join one **^^Command Squad^^** unit from your army (a **^^Command Squad^^** cannot have more than one **^^Loyal Protector^^** model joined to it). This model then counts as part of that **^^Command Squad^^** for the rest of the battle, and its Starting Strength is increased accordingly. If it is not possible to join this model to a **^^Command Squad^^**, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed. 

While this model is joined to a unit, it can embark within any **^^Transport^^** that unit can embark within, and takes up the space of 3 models.


This model cannot be selected as your **^^Warlord^^** and cannot be given Enhancements.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, you can roll one D6: on a 1, this **^^Psyker^^**’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, models in this **^^Psyker^^**’s unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 30" of and visible to this unit’s Officer of the Fleet model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly **^^Astra Militarum Aircraft^^** model makes a ranged attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this unit’s Astropath model.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit must join one **^^Command Squad^^** unit from your army (a **^^Command Squad^^** unit cannot have more than one **^^Regimental Attaché^^** unit joined to it). For the rest of the battle, every model in this unit counts as part of that **^^Command Squad^^** unit, and its Starting Strength is increased accordingly. If it is not possible to join a **^^Regimental Attaché^^** unit to a **^^Command Squad^^** in this way, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed.


While this unit is joined to a unit, it can embark within any **^^Transport^^** that unit can embark within.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If a friendly **^^Astra Militarum Vehicle^^** model is destroyed within 12" of this model, until the end of the battle, this model’s Enginseer axe has an Attacks characteristic of 6

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Command phase, select one friendly **^^Astra Militarum Vehicle^^** model within 3" of this model. That **^^Vehicle^^** model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, that **^^Vehicle^^** model has a 4+ invulnerable save. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, when an attack is allocated to this model, you change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly **^^Astra Militarum^^** model makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, if the attacking model is more than 12" away, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Orders
lines.value: This Officer can issue 1 Order to a Catachan Jungle Fighters unit

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if it is not within Engagement Rage of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. If it does, until the end of the turn, this model is not eligible to declare a charge.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit makes a ranged attack that targets a friendly **^^Regiment^^** unit within 3" of this model, after that enemy unit has shot, this model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this **^^Transport^^**, you can select one friendly **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** unit (excluding **^^Artillery^^** units) that is wholly within 6" of this **^^Transport^^**. Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this **^^Transport^^**.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 40 **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** models. Each **^^Ogryn^^** model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport **^^Artillery^^** models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s Stormsword siege cannon, roll one D6 for the target unit and every other unit within 3" of that unit: on a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by a concussive wave. After this model has finished making its attacks against that target unit this phase, each unit struck by a concussive wave suffers D3 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Orders
lines.value: This **^^Officer^^** can issue 2 Orders to **^^Squadron^^** units.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play – it can, after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, shoot as if it were your Shooting phase and as if it had its full wounds remaining. This model is then removed from play.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model issues an Order, it can issue it to an eligible unit up to 12" away

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Units can disembark from this **^^Transport^^** after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** models. Each **^^Ogryn^^** model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport **^^Artillery^^** models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this **^^Transport^^** this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 **^^Militarum Tempestus Infantry^^** or **^^Astra Militarum Infantry Character^^** models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

lines.name: Orders
lines.value: This **^^Officer^^** can issue up to 3 Orders to **^^Regiment^^** units.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, that unit can be affected by up to two different Orders at the same time.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly **^^Regiment^^** unit within 12" of that model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1 CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, one or more units embarked within this **^^Transport^^** can disembark from it.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** models. Each **^^Ogryn^^** model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport **^^Artillery^^** models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding **^^Monsters^^** and **^^Vehicles^^**) that was hit by one or more attacks made with this model’s Wyvern quad stormshard mortar. Unit the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can return up to D3 destroyed **^^Platoon^^** (excluding **^^Characters^^**) to this unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time the **^^Officer^^** in the bearer’s unit issues an Order, it can issue it to an eligible unit up to 24" away.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

entries.name: Sergeant's autogun and close combat weapon

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if there are one or more friendly **^^Officer^^** models within 6": on a 5+, you gain 1CP

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer’s unit is below its Starting Strength, you can return up to D3 destroyed Death Korps Troopers to this unit (if this unit contains two models equipped with a Death Korps medi-pack, return up to D3+1 destroyed Death Korps Troopers to this unit instead).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 4.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is within your opponent’s deployment zone, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model or an enemy unit ends a move, if this model is within 3" of one or more enemy units, select one of those enemy units. This model is destroyed, but instead of rolling for its Deadly Demise ability, roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: When rolling for this model’s Deadly Demise ability, units within 6" suffer mortal wounds on a 4+, instead of on a 6.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model can embark within an ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT model as if it were an INFANTRY model. If it does, it takes up the space of 7 models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack targets this model, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Ranged weapons equipped by this model have the [IGNORES COVER] ability while targeting an enemy unit within half range.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you target this model with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play – it can, after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, shoot with its inferno gun as if it were your Shooting phase and as if it had its full wounds remaining. This model is then removed from play.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its earthshaker cannon scored a hit against an INFANTRY unit, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that INFANTRY unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its Stormblade plasma blastgun that targets a unit within half range, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, if it is within range of an objective marker you control, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its Macharius twin vanquisher cannon that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, if it is within range of an objective marker you control, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is being affected by an Order, each time it makes an attack with its Praetor launcher, it does not suffer the penalty to the Hit roll for attacking a unit that is not visible to it.

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Blast, Heavy, Ignores Cover, Indirect Fire

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-MONSTER 4+, Anti-VEHICLE 4+, Blast, Heavy, Indirect Fire

lines.value: Blast, Heavy, Ignores Cover, Indirect Fire

lines.value: Anti-MONSTER 4+, Anti-VEHICLE 4+, Blast, Heavy, Indirect Fire

lines.value: Blast, Heavy, Ignores Cover, Indirect Fire

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-MONSTER 4+, Anti-VEHICLE 4+, Blast, Heavy, Indirect Fire

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 35 ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY models. Each Heavy Weapons Team model and Veteran Heavy Weapons Team model takes up the space of  2 models. Each OGRYN model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport ARTILLERY models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model is selected to shoot, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, its Colossus siege mortar has the [ANTI-MONSTER 5+] and [ANTI-VEHICLE 5+] abilities while resolving those attacks.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Damage roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when another friendly ASTRA MILITARUM unit within 6" of this model is destroyed by an attack made by a unit that can Fly, one model from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, that model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: You can target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit is being affected by an Order, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, Heavy weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you set up this model on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, you can select one friendly ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit in Strategic Reserves. If you do, set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 9" of this model and more than 9" away from all enemy units.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Command phase, select one friendly ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE model within 3" of this model. That VEHICLE model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that VEHICLE model makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. The same VEHICLE model cannot be selected for both this ability and the REGIMENTAL ENGINSEER's Omnissiah’s Blessing ability in the same turn, and each model can only be selected for this ability once per Command phase.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 1 TAUROS model or 2 ASTRA MILITARUM WALKER models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this model starts the game in Hover mode and in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Astra Militarum Infantry models. Each Heavy Weapons Team model and Veteran Heavy Weapons Team model takes up the space of 2 models. Each Ogryn model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport Artillery models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its Dominus triple bombard scored a hit against an enemy Infantry unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 5+ Invulnerable Save against ranged attacks.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 30 **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** models. Each Heavy Weapons Team model and Veteran Heavy Weapons Team model takes up the space of 2 models. Each **^^Ogryn^^** model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport **^^Artillery^^** models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this **^^Transport^^**, you can select one friendly **^^Astra Militarum Infantry^^** unit (excluding **^^Artillery^^** units) that is wholly within 6" of this **^^Transport^^**. Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this **^^Transport^^**.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, you can target this unit with the Grenade Stratagem for 0CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a **^^Krieg Combat Engineers^^** unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Units can disembark from this Transport after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Astra Militarum Infantry models. Each Heavy Weapons Team model and Veteran Heavy Weapons Team model takes up the space of 2 models. It cannot transport Ogryn or Artillery models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets the closest eligible enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll or 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a Vehicle unit, add 1 to the Wound roll

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit contains 2 models, each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Whilst this unit contains one or more Medicae Servitors, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit contains a Quartermaster Revenant model, improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of this unit's Medical scalpels by 1

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one friendly Astra Militarum Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That Vehicle model regains up to D3 lost wounds. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 24" and visible to the bearer. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
■ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
■ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 24" and visible to the bearer. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: When this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform a meteoric descent. If it does, this model can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 3" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next Movement phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: For the purposes of embarking within Transports, each Elysian Sniper Team model counts as one Heavy Weapons Team model.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is being affected by an Order, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, ranged weapons equipped by this model have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its Medusa siege cannon scored a hit against an enemy Infantry unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) hit by one or more of those attacks. Unit the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this model starts the game in Hover mode and in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Astra Militarum Infantry models. Each Heavy Weapons Team model and Veteran Heavy Weapons Team model takes up the space of 2 models. It cannot transport Ogryn or Artillery models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack made by this model is allocated to a Monster or Vehicle model, re-roll a Damage roll of 1

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle round, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY or ASTRA MILITARUM MOUNTED unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. If you do, one model in that unit is destroyed, and that unit is then no longer Battle-shocked.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While another Officer model is in the same unit as this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack with its storm eagle rockets that targets an enemy unit that contains five or more models, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that can Fly, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) hit by one or more of those attacks made with this model’s Griffon heavy mortar. Unit the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its earthshaker cannon scored a hit against an enemy Infantry unit, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
■ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
■ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: You can ignore any or all modifiers to this unit’s Move characteristic and to Advance and Charge rolls made for it. In addition, this unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back

lines.name: Description
lines.value: When this model arrives from Strategic Reserves, it can be set up within your opponent’s deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to an ASTRA MILITARUM model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Arkurian Stormhammer model, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Astra Militarum Infantry models. Each Heavy Weapons Team model and Veteran Heavy Weapons Team model takes up the space of 2 models. Each Ogryn model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport Artillery models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Movement phase, when this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform a precision drop. If it does, this unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: When this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, the Tempestor Aquilon can shoot with its sentry weapon (its sentry flamer, sentry grenade launcher or sentry hot‑shot volley gun).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move as if it were your Movement phase. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
Once per battle, when this unit is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

**Designer’s Note:** *Place a Ratling Battlemutt token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.*

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The bearer’s unit has the **^^Grenades^^** keyword.

lines.name: Orders
lines.value: This unit’s **^^Officer^^** can issue 1 Order to a **^^Regiment^^** unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit contains an **^^Officer^^**, you can target this unit with Stratagems even while it is Battle-shocked and Orders issued to this unit do not cease to affect this unit if it becomes Battle-shocked.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The bearer's unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability against mortal wounds.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
Once per battle, when issuing an Order, the Lord Commissar can issue one additional Order.


Designer's Note: Place a Servo-scribes token next to the unit, removing it when this ability has been used.

lines.name: Orders
lines.value: This **^^Officer^^** can issue up to 3 Orders to **^^Regiment^^** units

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D3 wounds remaining.

lines.name: Orders
lines.value: This unit’s **^^Officer^^** can issue 1 Order to a **^^Regiment^^** unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll, you can re-roll one Wound roll and you can re-roll one Damage roll when resolving its attacks.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model issues an Order, it can issue it to an eligible unit up to 12" away

lines.name: Orders
lines.value: This **^^Officer^^** can issue 2 Orders to **^^Squadron^^** units.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a melee attack, unless this model's unit is Battle-shocked, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, you can target this unit with the Grenade Stratagem for 0CP.

entries.name: Krieg Combat Engineer w/ Combat shotgun
Krieg Combat Engineer w/ Remote mine

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 9" of and visible to the bearer and roll one D6: on 3+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds, or 2D3 mortal wounds instead if it is a **^^Vehicle^^** or **^^Fortifications^^** unit.

**Designer's Note:** *Place a Remote Mine token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.*

entries.name: Combat shotgun and close combat weapon

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

entries.name: Heavy Weapons Team w/ Heavy bolter
Heavy Weapons Team w/ Missile launcher

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While the Fire Coordinator model is on the battlefield, each time a Heavy Weapons Gunner model is destroyed, roll one D6: one a 3+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can shoot after the attacking model's unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

entries.name: Heavy Weapons Gunners w/ Krieg heavy flamer
Heavy Weapons Gunners w/ Twin Krieg heavy stubber

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with an Indirect Fire weapon scored a hit against an enemy unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test (if an **^^Infantry^^** unit is hit by one or more attacks made by a multiple rocket launcher, they must subtract 1 from their Battle-shock test when doing so).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to that unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Add 1 to the Leadership characteristic of models in this unit and you can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for this unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit’s Minka Lesk model is on the battlefield, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 5+ Invulnerable Save.

lines.name: Orders
lines.value: This unit’s **^^Officer^^** can issue 2 Orders to **^^Regiment^^** units.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.
